title: Juliette ou La clef des songes
writer: Georges Neveux, Jacques Viot, Marcel Carné
actors: Gérard Philipe, Suzanne Cloutier, Jean-Roger Caussimon
plot: Michel has stolen from his employer, Mr Bellanger, for the love of Juliette. He is now in jail. One night, while sleeping in his cell, he wakes up all of a sudden, the gates open and he finds himself in a strange village where all...
